meta.title: Afterburner: What It’s Like to Use MAX Afterburner!
meta.description:
It's an incredible experience! To have over 30,000 pounds of thrust rocketing you down the runway is something so outside our daily life that it's difficult to explain.

SUBSCRIBE for regular videos▶ https://www.youtube.com/c/HasardLee
